mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, writer, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
